movie.synopsis: Doraemon: Nobita’s Little Star Wars 2021 (2022) Doraemon Nobitas Little Star Wars 2021 (2022) Doraemon: Nobitas Little Star Wars 2021 (2022) Doraemon Nobita’s Little Star Wars 2021 (2022) One day during summer vacation, a palm-sized alien named Papi appears from a small rocket that Nobita picks up. He is the president of Pirika, a small planet in outer space, and has come to Earth to escape the rebels.
